The God of MePrivacy

This site collects one thing: your email address, and only when you choose to give it. It is used to send you the Hidden Chapters and news of The God of Me — nothing else.

Your address is stored with MailerLite, the service that delivers these letters, and is handled according to their privacy policy. It is never sold, shared, or traded. No advertising trackers run on this site.

Every letter carries an unsubscribe link. Use it at any time and your address is removed. If you'd like your information deleted, or have any question at all, write to max@thegodofme.com and it will be handled personally.

Last updated July 2026
